name: minitoolboxmcp
description: MCP server with developer utility tools — screenshot capture via Electron

scripts.dev: npx -y kill-port 5173 3100 && concurrently --kill-others -n vite,backend,electron -c green,yellow,blue "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && npm run dev
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build
